titleStmt.title: SII 39.17: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 17. (A.R. No. 17 of 1916.) SAṈṈAVAṈAM, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. SĀLYAVANĒŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE MAṆḌAPA IN FRONT OF THE SAME SHRINE. MĀṞAVA[RMAN] ALIAS TRIBHUVA[NA CHAKRAVARTIN]-KULAŚĒKHARADĒVA, WHO WAS PLEASED TO TAKE [ALL] COUNTRIES-23RD YEAR.

summary.p: Beginning lost. This inscription records the gift of land to the temple of Tiruchchaṉṉavaṉa muḍaiyār, by the assembly of Sundarapāṇḍyachatūrvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēya in Muttū[ṟṟu kū]ṟṟam for the supply of sacred food to the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī komāṟavaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉa
ṭalamuṅ koṇṭaruḷiya śrī kulacekaratevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 3vatu vruścikanā
yaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu Ēkādiśiyun tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum
peṟṟa Attattu nāḷ tiruccaṉṉavaṉattu Uṭaiyār tiruccaṉ
ṉavaṉamuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyilil Ādicaṇḍeśvaradevaṟku muttū
ṟṟattu pradeśa śrīsundarapāṇḍyayac caturvvedimaṅkalattu
[sabhai] yom pramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭuttapaṭiyāvatu Igrāmattu �
kai neṭumper nāṉūṟṟuvaṉ cantiyāka tiruppaḷḷiyeḻu
mutupaṭi cāttupaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭa nitta nimantaṅkaḷukku tevatāṉa
kāṇi kiḻamaiyāka kuṭuttataṟku Ellaiyāvatu kīḻpāṟke
llai teṟku nokkip perurkkuḷakkaraiyile yeṟappoṉa
vaḻicce kku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai kāraikkuṭi yel
laikkum kiḻaiveppaṅkuḷattu Ellaikku vaṭakkum melpā
ṟ kellai veppaṅkuḷattu kiḻellaikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟ
kellai Ārkoliyāṟṟukkut teṟkum Āka vicainta perunāṉ kellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nirnilamum puṉceyum karuñceyyum marammā m puḷiyum maṟṟuḷḷaraṅka
kuḷamum kuḷavāttalaiyum Ūruṇikaḷum nattamum maṟṟu nāṉ kellaikkuḷpaṭṭa Ivepperppaṭṭaṉavum cantirātityavaṟ cella Iṟaiyili tevatā
māṇam paṇṇik kuṭuttom Uṭaiyār tiruccaṉṉavaṉamuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil Āticaṇḍeśvaradeva sundarapāṇḍiyac caturvvetimaṅkalattu vaṟai
Ippaṭi tevatāṉa Iṟaiyili kuṭuttatil Ūṭukā kavum Innāṉkellai kup puṟampu pokak kaṭavatallavākavum Ippaṭic
tirātittavaṟ celvataāka nāṉkellaiyilum tiru nāṭṭi kallilum cempilum veṭṭik koḷvatāka cammatittu pramāṇam paṇṇi
Digital edition of SII 39.17 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
